name: topn
title: Top N Bar List
description: Horizontal Top-N ranked bar list widget: up to 8 rows, each a truncated entity name, a proportional horizontal bar (longest = the list max) and a right-aligned mono value with optional unit. Rendered by the pure OOW.topn renderer from a deterministic seed; a single --topn-c token recolours the bars (teal/blue/purple/…). Rows carry a hover wash and, when made interactive for drill-down, a keyboard focus ring; an aria-disabled list dims for no-data/loading.
